Halley's Atlantic voyages were 1698-1700, chart published 1701 (18th century). '17th-century' is loose; 'late-17th/early-18th-century' is accurate.

patches.find: core dynamics and outer magnetosphere coupling
patches.replace: core flow and core-mantle differential rotation
patches.rationale: Standard framing: centuries-scale westward drift is driven by core flow + core-mantle differential rotation (Finlay 2010, 2016), not outer magnetosphere coupling. Aligns with tldr_evidence.
